response: The 1978 movie based on a book written by a radio playwright and children's book author born in 1900 was produced by Kraft Suspense Theatre. The movie is an American television anthology series that was produced and broadcast from 1963 to 1965 on NBC, sponsored by Kraft Foods, and was seen three weeks out of every four. It was also produced by Roncom Films, which was founded by Anthony Boucher, a writer, editor, critic, and radio playwright.
